title: Plane Object
description: Transient plane. A transient plane is not displayed or saved in a document. Transient planes are used as a wrapper to work with raw plane information. A transient plane has no boundaries or size, but is infinite and is represented by a position, a normal, and an orientation in space. They are created statically using the create method of the Plane class.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Creates and returns an independent copy of this Plane object.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a transient plane object by specifying an origin and a normal direction.

methods.name: createUsingDirections
methods.description: Creates a transient plane object by specifying an origin along with U and V directions.

methods.name: intersectWithCurve
methods.description: Intersect this plane with a curve to get the intersection point(s).

methods.name: intersectWithLine
methods.description: Creates a 3D point at the intersection of this plane and a line.

methods.name: intersectWithPlane
methods.description: Creates an infinite line at the intersection of this plane with another plane.

methods.name: intersectWithSurface
methods.description: Intersect this plane with a surface to get the intersection point(s).

methods.name: isCoPlanarTo
methods.description: Checks if this plane is coplanar with another plane.

methods.name: isParallelToLine
methods.description: Checks if this plane is parallel to a line.

methods.name: isParallelToPlane
methods.description: Checks if this plane is parallel to another plane.

methods.name: isPerpendicularToLine
methods.description: Checks if this plane is perpendicular to a line.

methods.name: isPerpendicularToPlane
methods.description: Checks if this plane is perpendicular to another plane.

methods.name: setUVDirections
methods.description: Sets the U and V directions of the plane.

methods.name: transformBy
methods.description: Updates this surface by transforming it with a given input matrix.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: normal
properties.description: Gets and sets the normal of the plane.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: origin
properties.description: Gets and sets the origin point of the plane.

properties.name: uDirection
properties.description: Gets the U Direction of the plane.

properties.name: vDirection
properties.description: Gets the V Direction of the plane.

classType.title: Plane.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

copy.title: Plane.copy Method
copy.description: Creates and returns an independent copy of this Plane object.
copy.return_description: Returns a new Plane object that is a copy of this Plane object.

create.title: Plane.create Method
create.description: Creates a transient plane object by specifying an origin and a normal direction.
create.return_description: Returns the new plane object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: The origin point of the plane.

parameters.name: normal
parameters.description: The normal direction of the plane.

createUsingDirections.title: Plane.createUsingDirections Method
createUsingDirections.description: Creates a transient plane object by specifying an origin along with U and V directions.
createUsingDirections.return_description: Returns the new plane object or null if the creation failed.

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: The origin point of the plane.

parameters.name: uDirection
parameters.description: The U direction for the plane.

parameters.name: vDirection
parameters.description: The V direction for the plane.

intersectWithCurve.title: Plane.intersectWithCurve Method
intersectWithCurve.description: Intersect this plane with a curve to get the intersection point(s).
intersectWithCurve.return_description: Returns a collection of the intersection points.

parameters.name: curve
parameters.description: The intersecting curve. The curve can be a Line3D, InfininteLine3D, Circle3D, Arc3D, EllipticalArc3D, Ellipse3D, or NurbsCurve3D.

intersectWithLine.title: Plane.intersectWithLine Method
intersectWithLine.description: Creates a 3D point at the intersection of this plane and a line.
intersectWithLine.return_description: Returns a Point3D object or null if the plane and line do not intersect (are parallel).

intersectWithPlane.title: Plane.intersectWithPlane Method
intersectWithPlane.description: Creates an infinite line at the intersection of this plane with another plane.
intersectWithPlane.return_description: Returns an InfiniteLine3D object or null if the planes do not intersect (are parallel).

intersectWithSurface.title: Plane.intersectWithSurface Method
intersectWithSurface.description: Intersect this plane with a surface to get the intersection point(s).
intersectWithSurface.return_description: Returns a collection of the intersection points.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: The intersecting surface. The surface can be a Plane, Cone, Cylinder, EllipticalCone, EllipticalCylinder, Sphere, Torus, or a NurbsSurface.

isCoPlanarTo.title: Plane.isCoPlanarTo Method
isCoPlanarTo.description: Checks if this plane is coplanar with another plane.
isCoPlanarTo.return_description: Returns true if the planes are coplanar.

parameters.name: plane
parameters.description: The plane to compare with for co-planarity.

isParallelToLine.title: Plane.isParallelToLine Method
isParallelToLine.description: Checks if this plane is parallel to a line.
isParallelToLine.return_description: Returns true if the plane and line are parallel.

parameters.name: line
parameters.description: The line to compare with for parallelism.

isParallelToPlane.title: Plane.isParallelToPlane Method
isParallelToPlane.description: Checks if this plane is parallel to another plane.
isParallelToPlane.return_description: Returns true if the planes are parallel.

parameters.name: plane
parameters.description: The plane to compare with for parallelism.

isPerpendicularToLine.title: Plane.isPerpendicularToLine Method
isPerpendicularToLine.description: Checks if this plane is perpendicular to a line.
isPerpendicularToLine.return_description: Returns true if the plane and line are perpendicular.

parameters.name: line
parameters.description: The line to compare with for perpendicularity.

isPerpendicularToPlane.title: Plane.isPerpendicularToPlane Method
isPerpendicularToPlane.description: Checks if this plane is perpendicular to another plane.
isPerpendicularToPlane.return_description: Returns true if the planes are perpendicular.

parameters.name: plane
parameters.description: The plane to compare with for perpendicularity.

setUVDirections.title: Plane.setUVDirections Method
setUVDirections.description: Sets the U and V directions of the plane.

parameters.name: uDirection
parameters.description: The U direction for the plane.

parameters.name: vDirection
parameters.description: The V direction for the plane.

transformBy.title: Plane.transformBy Method
transformBy.description: Updates this surface by transforming it with a given input matrix.
transformBy.return_description: Returns true if the transform was successful.

parameters.name: matrix
parameters.description: A 3D matrix that defines the transform to apply to the surface.
